summary: Roster Intelligence Enhancements - All tests PASSED. Backend: 15/15 tests passed. Frontend: 10/10 UI tests passed. Features verified: Momentum labels (Strong/Stable/Declining), 7-stage recruiting pipeline (Contacted/Talking/Offer visible), inline risk alerts (12 athletes), tinted row backgrounds, view switcher, search filter.
critical_code_review_comments: Code quality is good - MomentumBadge, StageBadge, RiskAlert components are clean and well-structured
Backend momentum logic correctly uses score, trend, and activity thresholds
7-stage pipeline mapping from raw stage to detailed stage is working correctly
Risk alerts from decision engine properly attached to each athlete with badge_color for severity
seed_data_creation: None - used existing ATHLETES data from mock_data.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Roster intelligence enhancements fully verified. Distribution: Momentum (Strong=13, Stable=6, Declining=6), Stages (Talking=12, Contacted=7, Offer=6), Risk (Critical=1, Warning=11, None=13). All 12 athletes with risk_alerts show inline warning badges. Tinted row backgrounds working (red-50/30 for critical, amber-50/20 for warning). All existing functionality (Team/Coach/Age views, search filter, hover actions, needs attention banner) still working.

momentum_labels.details: Backend returns momentum_label (strong/stable/declining) for all 25 athletes. Distribution: Strong=13, Stable=6, Declining=6. Frontend shows badges with TrendingUp/Minus/TrendingDown icons in green/gray/red colors.

7_stage_pipeline.details: Backend returns recruiting_stage from 7-stage pipeline. Distribution: Talking=12, Contacted=7, Offer=6. Frontend shows StageBadge with colored dot and mini progress bar.

risk_alerts.details: Backend returns risk_alerts array and risk_level (critical/warning/null). 12 athletes have non-empty risk_alerts (1 critical, 11 warning). Frontend shows inline RiskAlert component with warning text.

tinted_row_backgrounds.details: Athletes with risk_alerts have subtly tinted row backgrounds: red-50/30 for critical, amber-50/20 for warning.

view_switcher.details: Team View, Coach View, and Age Group view switcher still works.

search_filter.details: Typing 'Marcus' filters to 1 athlete (Marcus Johnson). Clearing shows all 25.

hover_quick_actions.details: Hover on athlete row shows Open, Assign, Notes quick actions.

needs_attention_banner.details: Banner shows 12 items at top with 'Show all 12' to expand. Items show athlete name, alert reason, and risk indicator dot.
